tests.test_name: Gap Analysis renders and JSON is complete for QA Manager
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager can run a Gap Analysis on a BDD test file and receive complete, well-structured output covering both coverage and robustness gaps.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Gap Analysis add-on produces visible results after submission

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage Gaps appears exactly once
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output contains a single, non-duplicated Coverage Gaps section

test_coverage.verification_step: Robustness Gaps appears exactly once
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output contains a single, non-duplicated Robustness Gaps section

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders or template tokens in the downloaded JSON are fully populated

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key gap_analysis
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON follows the expected schema structure

test_coverage.verification_step: gap_analysis section has a non-empty coverage_gaps
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one coverage gap was identified and recorded in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: coverage_gaps appears exactly once in gap_analysis
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON structure is clean with no duplicated keys

tests.test_name: Gap Analysis renders and JSON is complete for Product Owner
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner can run a Gap Analysis on a BDD test file and receive complete, well-structured output covering both coverage and robustness gaps.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Gap Analysis add-on produces visible results after submission

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage Gaps appears exactly once
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output contains a single, non-duplicated Coverage Gaps section

test_coverage.verification_step: Robustness Gaps appears exactly once
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output contains a single, non-duplicated Robustness Gaps section

tests.test_name: Gap analysis with regression layer passes layer context through to metadata
tests.description: Verifies that selecting the Regression / Smoke testing layer correctly records that context in the output metadata when running a Gap Analysis.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Gap Analysis add-on produces visible results after submission with a testing layer selected

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders or template tokens in the downloaded JSON are fully populated

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer regression
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen testing layer is correctly passed through and stored in the output metadata

tests.test_name: Gap analysis with unit layer passes layer context through to metadata
tests.description: Verifies that selecting the Unit testing layer correctly records that context in the output metadata when running a Gap Analysis.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Gap Analysis add-on produces visible results after submission with a testing layer selected

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders or template tokens in the downloaded JSON are fully populated

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer unit
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen testing layer is correctly passed through and stored in the output metadata
